trigon_drop.title: Collect a unique drop from the Ender Trigon (boss-specific loot from the Ender Trigon mod)

subtitle.text: The Ender Trigon was not the dragon's child. It was what came before the dragon.

description: The Ender Trigon fight requires sequential head targeting.
Phase 1 — All three heads active. Do not focus one head until you have
reduced all three to roughly equal health. Burning one head early
sends the other two into enrage mode.
Phase 2 — With one head fallen, the remaining two begin special combos:
Void + Lightning creates chain void bolts.
Keep moving. Do not hold still.
Phase 3 — Final head. Fully enraged. Maximum damage output.
This is a burn phase. Use your highest damage output.
Keep a Totem of Undying equipped.
The Trigon drops the Baby Ender Trigon egg on first kill.
It also drops unique materials for Ch14 crafting.
